metadata.title: Oxford English Primary 3 (Shanghai Edition)
metadata.subtitle: 牛津上海版小学英语三年级下册

unit1.name: Seeing and hearing
unit1.topic: 学习视觉和听觉相关词汇，包括交通工具

sentences.chinese: 你还能听见其他什么吗？

sentences.english: I can see a bus, and some cars too.
sentences.chinese: 我能看见一辆巴士，还有一些小汽车。

sentences.english: I can't see them, but I can hear them.
sentences.chinese: 我看不见它们，但我能听到它们的声音。

unit2.name: Touching and feeling
unit2.topic: 学习触摸和感觉相关词汇，描述物品质地

sentences.chinese: 这个书包摸起来怎么样？
这些杯子摸起来怎么样？
它们是光滑而又坚硬的。

sentences.english: How much is the Moon pie?

unit3.name: Tasting and smelling
unit3.topic: 学习品尝和嗅觉相关词汇，描述味道

sentences.chinese: 这柠檬闻起来有怎样的气味？
这咖啡尝起来有怎样的味道？

sentences.english: May I have some apples, please?

phonetics.description: wh字母组合发/w/音（少数发/h/音，如who）

unit4.name: Animals
unit4.topic: 学习动物相关词汇，描述动物特征

sentences.english: Do the monkeys like the hats?
Does Uncle Bai get his hats back?
sentences.chinese: 白叔叔拿回他的帽子了吗？

unit5.name: Toys
unit5.topic: 学习玩具相关词汇，描述活动和能力

sentences.english: I like robots. They are super.
sentences.chinese: 我喜欢机器人。它们很厉害。

sentences.english: I can ride a skateboard very well.
They can walk and play football.

unit6.name: Clothes
unit6.topic: 学习服装相关词汇，描述衣物和数量

sentences.english: What do you have for winter?
I have a pair of gloves and a hat.
sentences.chinese: 我戴一副手套和一顶帽子。

unit7.name: Shapes
unit7.topic: 学习形状相关词汇，描述几何图形

unit8.name: Colours
unit8.topic: 学习颜色相关词汇，描述自然和物体颜色

sentences.english: It's red, orange, yellow, green, blue, purple and violet.
What colour are the leaves in spring?
sentences.chinese: 春天里叶子是什么颜色？

sentences.english: What does the grasshopper like doing in autumn?
sentences.chinese: 这蚱蜢喜欢在秋天干什么？

sentences.english: It likes singing and dancing in autumn.
